supply_chain.dependencies: The Company uses a wide variety of raw materials, which are generally purchased from a large number of independent sources around the world. Substantially all materials, parts and components purchased by the Company are available from a large number of independent sources.
supply_chain.risks: Supply chain constraints, global supply chain disruptions, availability and price fluctuations of raw materials, parts and components, supplier allocations to other purchasers, interruptions in production by suppliers due to geopolitical or civil unrest, unfavorable economic conditions, increased or new tariffs and other trade barriers, labor disruptions, catastrophic weather events, natural disasters, public health concerns

regulatory_risks: Environmental regulations including climate change laws and regulations
Restrictions on emissions of carbon dioxide or other greenhouse gases
Taxation of or caps on the use of carbon-based energy
Limitations or restrictions on water use
Limitations or restrictions on the production of single-use plastics
Regulations on energy management and waste management
European Union's Corporate Sustainability Reporting Directive
Data privacy and security laws including GDPR and CCPA/CPRA
Anti-bribery laws including U.S. Foreign Corrupt Practices Act and U.K. Bribery Act
Employment practices and workplace behavior regulations
Tax regulations including OECD Pillar Two global minimum tax

sanction_risks: Sanctions on Russia related to Ukraine war
Potential sanctions related to Middle East tensions
Trade restrictions between United States and China
Withdrawal from or renegotiation of international trade agreements
Imposition of and changes in trade regulations, trade wars, increased or new tariffs and other trade barriers
